series_metadata.series_description: This series contains: Federal Forms OARS-3 A, OARS-30, OARS-51, SSA-3961 and SSA-3964 used to report earnings of and deposits made for employees in participating entities in the Social Security Participation Program (University of Cincinnati, Toledo Mudhens)

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in storage facility Fifty (50) years
